_notes: Additive monthly climate columns for the sustainability annual energy/water estimators
(Phase 195). Keyed by climate-site id (same id as STING_CLIMATE_DATA.json). Per site:
meanDbC[12]      monthly mean dry-bulb temperature, degC (Jan..Dec)
ghiKwhM2Day[12]  monthly mean global horizontal irradiance, kWh/m2.day
annualGhiKwhM2Yr annual GHI total (kWh/m2.yr) — used for PV yield + facade solar
rainfallMm[12]   monthly rainfall, mm (used by RWH inside the water estimator)
gridCarbonKgco2eKwh default grid emission factor for this location.
Sites WITHOUT a monthly record fall back to design-day values from
Project override merged by id from
Sources: NASA POWER monthly climatology, ASHRAE 2021, national met normals.
Bangui (CAR) values are estimates from NASA POWER for confirmation before certified use.

sites.label: Bangui (Central African Republic)
sites.source: NASA POWER monthly climatology (estimate; confirm against on-site data before certified use)

sites.label: London (Heathrow)
sites.source: Met Office 1991-2020 normals + NASA POWER GHI
